MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bracamontes, Esq., 415.835.6777, for plaintiff Henry Flowers.
Virgil Pryor, Esq., 415.392.8300, for defendants Peter Weber MD and G. James Avery MD.

RULING: Argued and the Court DENIED PLAINTIFF HENRY FLOWERS'S Motion For Sanctions per CCP Section 437C(J). Plaintiff to prepare proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT G. JAMES AVERY M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. The declaration of Dr. Smith creates a triable issue of material fact regarding whether defendant breached the standard of care. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
